visual_description:
INT. NIGHTTIME INTERIOR - BEDROOM

A young man is lying down in bed under a blanket when he suddenly stops and places his finger against his lips as if shushing someone or something.

He looks directly at the camera with an expression that's difficult to read — part contemplative, part mysterious.

The room is dimly lit by what appears to be ambient light from off-camera, creating soft shadows on his face. The overall mood feels private and introspective, suggesting a moment of reflection before bed or perhaps a secret shared only with the viewer.
